parts.text:
Look through the opencode CLI help/docs to find how to export sessions. Check:
1. Run `opencode --help` to see all commands
2. Run `opencode session --help` if that exists
3. Check if there's an `opencode export` command
4. Look at `~/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db` - are there any CLI tools for exporting from it?
5. Search for any session export functionality

Return the exact commands needed to export opencode sessions, especially the session IDs related to project "philo" at /Users/albert/Projects/philo.
The user wants me to explore the `opencode` CLI tool to find how to export sessions. Let me investigate systematically.

state.output:
⠀                                ▄     
█▀▀█ █▀▀█ █▀▀█ █▀▀▄ █▀▀▀ █▀▀█ █▀▀█ █▀▀█
█  █ █  █ █▀▀▀ █  █ █    █  █ █  █ █▀▀▀
▀▀▀▀ █▀▀▀ ▀▀▀▀ ▀  ▀ ▀▀▀▀ ▀▀▀▀ ▀▀▀▀ ▀▀▀▀

Commands:
  opencode completion          generate shell completion script
  opencode acp                 start ACP (Agent Client Protocol) server
  opencode mcp                 manage MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers
  opencode [project]           start opencode tui                                          [default]
  opencode attach <url>        attach to a running opencode server
  opencode run [message..]     run opencode with a message
  opencode debug               debugging and troubleshooting tools
  opencode providers           manage AI providers and credentials                   [aliases: auth]
  opencode agent               manage agents
  opencode upgrade [target]    upgrade opencode to the latest or a specific version
  opencode uninstall           uninstall opencode and remove all related files
  opencode serve               starts a headless opencode server
  opencode web                 start opencode server and open web interface
  opencode models [provider]   list all available models
  opencode stats               show token usage and cost statistics
  opencode export [sessionID]  export session data as JSON
  opencode import <file>       import session data from JSON file or URL
  opencode github              manage GitHub agent
  opencode pr <number>         fetch and checkout a GitHub PR branch, then run opencode
  opencode session             manage sessions
  opencode plugin <module>     install plugin and update config                      [aliases: plug]
  opencode db                  database tools

Positionals:
  project  path to start opencode in                                                        [string]

Options:
  -h, --help          show help                                                            [boolean]
  -v, --version       show version number                                                  [boolean]
      --print-logs    print logs to stderr                                                 [boolean]
      --log-level     log level                 [string] [choices: "DEBUG", "INFO", "WARN", "ERROR"]
      --pure          run without external plugins                                         [boolean]
      --port          port to listen on                                        [number] [default: 0]
      --hostname      hostname to listen on                          [string] [default: "127.0.0.1"]
      --mdns          enable mDNS service discovery (defaults hostname to 0.0.0.0)
                                                                          [boolean] [default: false]
      --mdns-domain   custom domain name for mDNS service (default: opencode.local)
                                                                [string] [default: "opencode.local"]
      --cors          additional domains to allow for CORS                     [array] [default: []]
  -m, --model         model to use in the format of provider/model                          [string]
  -c, --continue      continue the last session                                            [boolean]
  -s, --session       session id to continue                                                [string]
      --fork          fork the session when continuing (use with --continue or --session)  [boolean]
      --prompt        prompt to use                                                         [string]
      --agent         agent to use                                                          [string]
      --mini          start the minimal interactive interface             [boolean] [default: false]
      --no-replay     disable mini session history replay on resume and after resize       [boolean]
      --replay-limit  cap visible mini replay to the newest N messages                      [number]

  -c, --continue      continue the last session                                            [boolean]

parts.text: All of these sessions are tied to the "philo" project (`/Users/albert/Projects/philo`). Now let me also check the `opencode export` command more closely and see what the `--sanitize` flag does, and also demonstrate how to export sessions.

parts.text: Now I have all the information needed. Let me compile the findings.

Here is a complete summary of all findings:

---

## 1. The `opencode export` Command

**`opencode export [sessionID]`** exports a session as JSON to stdout.

| Flag | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `--sanitize` | Redacts sensitive transcript and file data |
| No arguments | Opens an interactive picker to choose a session |

---

## 2. All "philo" Sessions & Their IDs

All 9 sessions belong to project `/Users/albert/Projects/philo` (project ID `241e4c32...`):

| Session ID | Title | Slug | Created |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ses_0e89c5c05ffeecPxAQcfXwyHKr` | Find opencode export command (@explore subagent) | glowing-comet | 6/30/2026 |
| `ses_0e8aa759dffeoJscFS3Vk59Uvo` | Batch 2 reprise process ETA | witty-garden | 6/30/2026 |
| `ses_0ea1ca04effeWjzHdBjHUW2fp2` | Check status of background job baznyjy9n | stellar-planet | 6/29/2026 |
| `ses_0e8aa5c34ffe07JDSm1OjzJot5` | Find batch reprise process (@explore subagent) | brave-planet | 6/30/2026 |
| `ses_0e971097fffe3nACGxuAB8bKY5` | Explore tasks and iteration (@explore subagent) | shiny-cabin | 6/29/2026 |
| `ses_0ea1b4107ffe4BkcHudJniZL8C` | Explore reward hacking suites (@explore subagent) | witty-rocket | 6/29/2026 |
| `ses_0ea8b7b2effe369rDfw41s1MTH` | Phase 2 Axes 1 and 3 study results | hidden-falcon | 6/29/2026 |
| `ses_0ea940ad8ffe5Bh2uUlSG7JdxB` | Consistency measure across multiple requests to same judge | silent-knight | 6/29/2026 |
| `ses_0ea9b3eceffeQulFCzlQfKqIZi` | Rubrics Phase 2 failure cases and measurement ideas | sunny-cactus | 6/29/2026 |

---

## 3. Exact Export Commands

**Export a single session to a file:**
```bash
opencode export ses_0e89c5c05ffeecPxAQcfXwyHKr > philo-session-glowing-comet.json
```

**Export with sanitized data (redact sensitive content):**
```bash
opencode export ses_0ea8b7b2effe369rDfw41s1MTH --sanitize > philo-hidden-falcon-sanitized.json
```

**Export all "philo" sessions (one-by-one):**
```bash
opencode export ses_0e89c5c05ffeecPxAQcfXwyHKr > ses_0e89c5c05ffeecPxAQcfXwyHKr.json
opencode export ses_0e8aa759dffeoJscFS3Vk59Uvo > ses_0e8aa759dffeoJscFS3Vk59Uvo.json
opencode export ses_0ea1ca04effeWjzHdBjHUW2fp2 > ses_0ea1ca04effeWjzHdBjHUW2fp2.json
opencode export ses_0e8aa5c34ffe07JDSm1OjzJot5 > ses_0e8aa5c34ffe07JDSm1OjzJot5.json
opencode export ses_0e971097fffe3nACGxuAB8bKY5 > ses_0e971097fffe3nACGxuAB8bKY5.json
opencode export ses_0ea1b4107ffe4BkcHudJniZL8C > ses_0ea1b4107ffe4BkcHudJniZL8C.json
opencode export ses_0ea8b7b2effe369rDfw41s1MTH > ses_0ea8b7b2effe369rDfw41s1MTH.json
opencode export ses_0ea940ad8ffe5Bh2uUlSG7JdxB > ses_0ea940ad8ffe5Bh2uUlSG7JdxB.json
opencode export ses_0ea9b3eceffeQulFCzlQfKqIZi > ses_0ea9b3eceffeQulFCzlQfKqIZi.json
```

**Export all with a quick loop:**
```bash
for sid in $(sqlite3 ~/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db \
  "SELECT session.id FROM session JOIN project ON session.project_id = project.id WHERE project.worktree = '/Users/albert/Projects/philo';"); do
  opencode export "$sid" > "${sid}.json"
done
```

**Interactive picker (no session ID -> prompts you):**
```bash
opencode export
```

---

## 4. Related Commands Discovered

| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| `opencode export [sessionID]` | Export session as JSON (stdout) |
| `opencode import <file>` | Import session JSON from file or URL |
| `opencode session list` | List all sessions with IDs, titles, timestamps |
| `opencode session delete <sessionID>` | Delete a session |
| `opencode db [query]` | Run raw SQL on the SQLite database (also: `opencode db path` to print DB path) |
| `opencode db path` | Print the database file path |

---

## 5. Database Location

The opencode database is at:
```
~/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db
```

You can query it directly with:
```bash
opencode db "SELECT id, title FROM session;"
# or use sqlite3 directly:
sqlite3 ~/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db "SELECT * FROM session;"
```

The key tables are:
- **`project`** -- has columns `id`, `worktree` (the project path), `name`
- **`session`** -- has columns `id` (the session ID), `project_id`, `slug`, `directory`, `title`, `model`, `agent`, `time_created`, `time_updated`, etc.
- **`project_directory`** -- maps project IDs to directories
